summary: Tested Daily.co cloud recordings feature for offline lesson viewing. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend correctly implements the NEXT tab with recordings fetching, YouTube fallback, and Teacher Notes display. The recordings endpoint returns empty array as expected since no live sessions have been recorded yet.
passed_tests: Backend: Member can get recordings (returns 200 with proper response structure)
Backend: Recordings endpoint returns empty array with has_recordings=false when no recordings exist
Backend: Non-existent lesson returns 404 for recordings endpoint
Backend: Recordings response structure is valid (lesson_id, recordings array, has_recordings boolean)
Backend: Video room status endpoint working
Backend: watched_replay attendance action can be recorded
Backend: watched_replay appears in user's attendance actions
Frontend: NEXT tab renders with 'Watch Replay' subtitle
Frontend: YouTube video displayed as fallback content when no recordings
Frontend: Teacher Notes section visible and renders markdown content
Frontend: 'Watched' indicator shows attendance tracking for replay viewing
Frontend: videoRoomAPI.getRecordings method exists at line 138 in api.js
Frontend: NOW tab shows 'Join Video Room' button
Frontend: NOW tab shows 'You've joined video!' confirmation
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data with lessons containing youtube_url for fallback content
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cloud recordings feature fully implemented. Backend endpoint GET /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/recordings fetches from Daily.co API via DailyService.get_recordings(). Frontend LessonDetail.jsx fetches recordings when NEXT tab is active, displays Session Recordings section when recordings exist, shows YouTube fallback otherwise. Cloud recording enabled on new rooms via 'enable_recording: cloud' property. Recording playback triggers 'watched_replay' attendance action. Note: Recordings array will be empty until live video sessions are held and recorded through Daily.co.
